member.name: T:Core.Interfaces.Service.IAccountService
member.summary: Defines the contract for user authentication operations including registration and login.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Service.IAccountService.RegisterAsync(Core.DTOs.AuthDtos.RegisterDto)
member.summary: Registers a new client user and returns a token pair upon success.
member.param: The registration data including name, email, username and password.
member.returns: A containing with access and refresh tokens if successful.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Service.IAccountService.LoginAsync(Core.DTOs.AuthDtos.LoginDto)
member.summary: Authenticates a user by username and password and returns a token pair.
member.param: The login credentials containing username and password.
member.returns: A containing with access and refresh tokens if successful.
